Skill: UX Behavioral Loop
Description: Architect of behavior based on Hooked (Eyal) and Fogg model. Use to design loops of engagement and retention based on real value and product ethics. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Sources - Hooked — Nir Eyal - Modelo Fogg (BJ Fogg)
Triggers: behavioral loop, engagement, retention, hooked, fogg model, habit design
Stack: Next.js 15+ App Router; React 19+; TanStack Query; shadcn/ui + Tailwind v4; Monorepo (apps + packages)
Workflow:
- 1. Mapear trigger, acao, recompensa e investimento do flow principal.
- 2. Simplificar acao — reduzir passos, friccao motora e cognitiva.
- 3. Validate that reward reinforces functional value, not artificial anxiety.
- 4. Projetar micro-investimentos que aumentam utilidade futura do product.
- 5. Auditar by dark patterns of retencao e apply guardrails eticos.
Output Contract:
- Mapa of loop comportamental by etapa.
- Tabela of friccao (reduzir, manter, aumentar).
- Plano of experimento of retencao with metrics D1/D7/D30.
- Checklist etico of engajamento.
